heading: Sunday
text: Sunny skies mixing with clouds along the eastern mountain slopes. Highs in the low to mid 80s, warmer in the valleys, few upper 70s north. Winds light and variable. Highs in the low to mid 80s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear and calm. A chance of valley fog. Lows in the mid 50s to low 60s in the broad valleys.

heading: Monday
text: Any early fog giving way to mostly sunny skies, clouds building north and west in the afternoon. Highs in the 80s, nearing 90 in the warmer valleys. Wind turning southwest near 10 mph, light north.
